truth_boundary: Rows interpret generated statistics and visual evidence; they do not convert synthetic or N=1 diagnostics into population physiology or reference-device validation.

rows.label: Robust amplitude shape
rows.estimand: finite-sample distribution shape of detected synthetic saccade amplitudes
rows.interpretation: Quartiles, Bowley skew, and outside values describe amplitude shape before parametric fits.
rows.does_not_prove: a population amplitude law or real-eye physiology

rows.label: Relative model comparison
rows.estimand: relative fit ranking among candidate amplitude distributions
rows.interpretation: Information criteria and bootstrap winner frequency describe ranking stability.
rows.does_not_prove: true family membership or posterior probability

rows.label: Distribution residual checks
rows.reported_value: QQ RMSE 4.62 deg; P-P max |res| 0.25; DKW +/- 0.35
rows.interpretation: QQ/P-P residuals and a DKW/Massart band show selected-family fit gaps.
rows.does_not_prove: a formal model-selection theorem or a device-accuracy result

rows.label: Main-sequence uncertainty
rows.estimand: finite-sample uncertainty for the detected synthetic main-sequence exponent
rows.interpretation: Seeded bootstrap interval for this report's exponent variability.
rows.does_not_prove: human physiological population bounds or camera timing precision

rows.label: Spatial stability descriptors
rows.reported_value: disp 14.86 deg; BCEA 449.54 deg2; entropy 2.43 bits
rows.estimand: within-report fixation/gaze spread and entropy descriptors
rows.interpretation: Dispersion, hull/BCEA, and entropy summarize within-report spread.
rows.does_not_prove: absolute gaze accuracy or participant-level stability

rows.label: Scanpath transition structure
rows.estimand: first-order direction-symbol transition structure in one report
rows.interpretation: Transition matrix summarizes local scanpath grammar for QA.
rows.does_not_prove: identity, biometrics, cognition, or anomaly labels

rows.label: Idealized noise sensitivity
rows.reported_value: F1 edge 0.92 px; RMS edge 3.05 px
rows.estimand: closed-loop estimator sensitivity to seeded synthetic landmark jitter
rows.interpretation: Threshold crossings show where idealized landmark jitter degrades recovery.
rows.does_not_prove: webcam optics, MediaPipe bias, lighting, or hardware noise

rows.label: Synthetic/empirical context
rows.estimand: relationship between one local N=1 session scale and synthetic/stress variables
rows.interpretation: Local-scale, stress-only, and non-comparable rows remain separated.
rows.does_not_prove: device validation, device performance, or universal webcam accuracy
